snippet.title: Vallah (Official Video) Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika | Pritam, Bayanni, Harrdy S, Amitabh B | Cocktail 2
snippet.description:
Warning: #Vallah may cause sudden dancing. 
Song out now.

#Cocktail2 in cinemas on June 19.

#Cocktail2Song #MaddockFilms 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

🎧 Song Credits 

➟ Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
➟ Music Label : Universal Music India and Mad For Mussic 
➟ Music - Pritam
➟ Lyrics- Amitabh Bhattacharya
➟ Punjabi Lyrics - Rony Ajnali and Gill Machhrai
➟ Singers - Bayanni, Harrdy Sandhu

➟ Music Programmer and Arranger - AM.AN
Mixed and Mastered by - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Audio Post Production Supervisor and Chief Engineer - Ashwin Kulkarni

Music Production Managers - Anurag Sharma, Brianna Supriyo
Studio Manager - Mithila Lad Nayak

Sound Engineers - Pranav Gupta, Aniruddh Anantha, Aarvan, Akash Mukherjee

Studio Assistants - Khush Jaggi, Ameya Dayal, Sagnik Mukherjee. 
Studio Intern- Anushree Amod

Shout - Aasa Singh
Backing Vocals Design and Vocals -  Aarvan, Aniruddh Anantha
Additional Chorus - Anurag Sharma, Akash Mukherjee, Sagnik Mukherjee

Live Guitars by - AM.AN 

Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai


#Cocktail2​, releasing in cinemas on 19th June, 2026


🎬 Video Credits

➟ Directed By: Homi Adajania 
➟ Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
➟ Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
➟ Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
➟ Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja

➟ Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
➟ Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
➟ Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
➟ Director of Choreography: Vijay A. Ganguly
➟ Publicity Design: Himanshu  & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Lyrics:

Ohh

let the worries fade away o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let my brothers drink today o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let the worries fade away o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI
let my brothers drink today o
CHAKK GILAASI CHAKK GILAASI

Jaadu kar gayi oh mere te
Dassa main kinu
Nain shraabi jihde yaaro
Pee gayi menu 

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu

Sham dhali to nain tere ni
Hor v sohne ho jande ne
Chann v terian siftan karda
Taare pagal ho jande ne
Patlo Banke agg hai firdi
Bijli wangu saade te girdi
cock-tail to vad ke saroor a
matthe te jedi latt a girdi

Aye this friendship
aint meant for
just a drink or two
we're together
aur koi
chahiye hi kyun

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Ain’t nobody Ain’t nobody jaise main Aur tu 

Tere ch dhyaan mera renda sohniye
Dass kinne lakh da ae lehanga sohniye
Nakhre tere te a news ban gayi
Diamond de naal o vad mehanga 
Jado tu nachh diye baby 
Bada hi jach diye baby 
Ya tu pari air shaadi
Ya tu kachh diye aaae baby

Aye this friendship
aint meant for
just a drink or two
we're together
aur koi
chahiye hi kyun

Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Enii sohni enii sohni
Bannke Nikli kyu
Vallah
haye re haye re haye haye re
haye re haye re haye haye re
Ain’t nobody Ain’t nobody jaise main Aur tu

snippet.title: Sun Saathiya Full Video | Disney's ABCD 2 | Varun Dhawan , Shraddha Kapoor | Sachin Jigar | Priya S
snippet.description:
Catch the full video of Sun Saathiya from Disney's ABCD 2 starring Varun Dhawan & Shraddha Kapoor. 

Title: Sun Saathiya
Movie: Disney's ABCD 2
Music Composer: Sachin – Jigar
Lyrics: Priya Saraiya
Singers: Priya Saraiya, Divya Kumar

Director: Remo D’Souza
Producer: Siddharth Roy Kapur
Production House: Disney

Lyrics:

Ho.. Sun Saathiya Maahiya
Barsa De Ishqa Ki Syahiyaan

Rang Jaaun, Rang Rang Jaaun Ri, Haari Main
Tujhpe Main Jhar Jhar Jhar Jaaun

Hoon Piya Bas Teri Main
Ho Chhu Le Toh Khari Main
(Toh Khari Main Khari Main…)

Main Ret Si, Boond Ka Zariya Tu
Paa Ke Tujhe Bheeg Jaaun Re
Main Ret Si, Boond Ka Zariya Tu
Paa Ke Tujhe Bheeg Jaaun Ri

Tar Jaaun Tar Tar Jaaun
Dariya Ye Tar Jaaun Jee
Ishq Ye Paake Main Tera
Nikhar Jaaun Ri…
Piya Bas Teri Main
Ho.. Chhu Le Toh Khari Main
Toh Khari Main Khari Main…

Sun Saathiya Maahiya
Barsa De Ishqa Ki Syahiyaan...

snippet.title: Aarzu (with Asim Azhar) Official Music Video | Asim Azhar, Noor, Khan, Madhurxo
snippet.description:
If Aarzu found a place in your heart, Asim Azhar's rendition takes it even deeper. Wrapped in dreamy melodies and timeless emotion, this version captures the beauty of yearning for someone who never truly leaves.


Listen Now:
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/1GnZH0wek1fkGCQnUsK6D0?si=c8a640db631c4690 Apple Music -  https://music.apple.com/in/song/aarzu-with-asim-azhar/6772998267 
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=M5OCLifZK1w&si=F6FdB9DEXBskKoUu 

Audio Credits: 
Music by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Lyrics by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Vocals by Asim Azhar, Khan, Madhurxo
Written by Asim Azhar, Khan, Noor
Produced by Noor
Guitars by Melvin Arthur
Mixed & Mastered by Kumail Abbas

Video Credits: 
Director - Khizar Sheikh
Producer - Syed Jahanzaib Ali
Executive Producer - Gul-E-Rana
D.O.P & Edit - Fraz KB 
Grade - Maaz Ahmad Ansari

Lyrics:

(Khan)

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

Tera sharmana meri jaana kabhi
Rakhlu chupaake teri yaadein sabh
Khwaabon main mere hai tu hi basi

(Madhurxo)

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

Peeche dekhu raahein teri yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaabon main basa hai tu hi tu.
Sawalon main main rakhlu chupake mujhe tu hi toh bigaade
Meri aankhon main saja hai tu hi tu

(Asim Azhar)

Oh kaisi dilkashi 
Tujh se dillagi
Mere humnasheen… hmmmm
Kioun chupaoun main
Ab koi darr nahi
Tu jaisay meri pari
Masoomiyut chulkay teri
Baatoun se kitni…hayee
Saada si jo adaa’ein teri
Qatil hai woh
Dil ki meri

Peechay dekhoun raahein teri
Yaadein jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

(Unknown)

Phirse Bolo

(Asim Azhar)

Peechay dekho raahein teri
Yaad jo rahi na meri
Khwaboun mein basa hai tu hi tu
Sawaaloun mein bhi rakh loun chupa ke
Mujhe tu hi tou bigaray
Meri ankhoun mein saja hai ti hi tu

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Khan and Asim)

Tera sharmana, meri jaana kabhi
Rakh loun chupa ke teri yaadein sab hi
Khwaboun mein mere hai tu hi basi
Tu hi basi… tu hi basi

(Outro)

Dono jahan teri muhabbat mein haar ke
Woh ja raha hai koi Shab’e Ghum guzaar ke
Weera’an hai maikada khum-o-saagar udaas hain     
Tum kya gaye k rooth gaye din bahaar

Connect: 
Asim Azhar ( https://www.instagram.com/asimazhar/?hl=en)
Khan (https://www.instagram.com/soundslikekhan/)
Noor (https://www.instagram.com/noor_wav/)
Madhurxo (https://www.instagram.com/madhuraaara/)

#AsimAzhar #Aarzu #PakistaniPop #DesiMusic #NewMusic #IPop 

(C) 2026 Asim Azhar

snippet.title: 🐯 Shinchan's Magic Goes Wrong! Pinchan Becomes a Tiger Man 😱 | Franklin & Shinchan GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
🐯 Shinchan's magic experiment goes horribly wrong in GTA 5 Malayalam!

During a magic class inspired by Harry Potter, Shinchan tries to perform a powerful spell on Pinchan. But something unexpected happens and Pinchan transforms into a Tiger Man! Frightened and confused, Pinchan escapes into the city.

Franklin and Shinchan begin a huge search operation to find him before it's too late. Meanwhile, Trevor the Hunter discovers Tiger Man Pinchan and captures him to make money by showing him to the public.

Can Franklin and Shinchan rescue Pinchan from Trevor? Will Harry help reverse the spell and bring Pinchan back to normal?

Watch this exciting GTA 5 Malayalam adventure filled with action, comedy, magic, rescue missions, and unexpected twists!

⭐ Characters:
Franklin
Shinchan
Pinchan
Trevor
Harry Potter

🎮 Game: Grand Theft Auto V (GTA 5)

#GTA5Malayalam #FranklinAndShinchan #Shinchan #GTA5 #MalayalamGaming #GTAMalayalam #Franklin #TigerMan #HarryPotter #GamingMalayalam

snippet.description:
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Phir Aana ! Dance Video ! Insta Trending Song ! ओ फिरकी वाली तू कल फिर आना #dj 
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️ | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026

O Firki Wali ek heart touching Hindi romantic song hai jo 90's Bollywood ke retro vibes aur emotional love story ko capture karta hai. Yeh gaana un sab ke liye hai jo sachche pyaar, yaadein aur judai ko mehsoos karte hain.

Isme aapko milega:
• Retro Bollywood feel 🎞️
• Emotional aur soulful lyrics 💔
• Soft melody jo dil ko chhoo jaaye 🎶
• Old is gold style romantic vibe ✨

Agar aapko 90's Bollywood songs, sad love songs, aur Hindi romantic music pasand hai, to yeh gaana aapke playlist me zaroor hona chahiye.

🎧 Best experience ke liye headphones use karein

👉 Like 👍 | Share 🔄 | Subscribe 🔔 zaroor karein
👉 Comment me batayein aapko yeh gaana kaisa laga ❤️

(Song Lyrics) 

ओ फ़िरकी वाली तू कल आ जा,
सपनों में मेरे फिर समा जा।
तेरी बातों का रंग निराला,
दिल को मेरे फिर बहला जा॥

जब से देखा तेरा चेहरा,
दिल ने तुझको अपना माना।
चाँद भी शरमा जाए देखे,
तेरा प्यारा सा मुस्काना॥

पायल की छम-छम सुनकर,
दिल मेरा बेकरार हो जाए।
एक नज़र जो तू मिलाए,
हर मौसम बहार हो जाए॥

ओ फ़िरकी वाली तू कल आ जा,
दिल की गलियों में फिर छा जा।
तेरी हँसी का जादू ऐसा,
सारी दुनिया को भुला जा॥

तेरी ज़ुल्फों की ठंडी छाँव,
मुझको अपना घर लगती है।
तेरी बातों की मीठी खुशबू,
साँसों में घुल जाती है॥

रातों को जब याद तू आए,
नींदों का पता खो जाए।
दिल के हर एक कोने में बस,
तेरा ही चेहरा नज़र आए॥

आ जा सजना देर न करना,
दिल को यूँ मजबूर न करना।
तेरे बिना ये तन्हा रातें,
लगती हैं सदियों के जैसा॥

snippet.title: Olivia Rodrigo - stupid song (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Listen to 'you seem pretty sad for a girl so in love' out now: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/girlsoinlove
Shop the collection: https://OliviaRodrigo.lnk.to/store

Follow Olivia Rodrigo:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/oliviarodrigo

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/OliviaRodrigoOfficial/
Discord: https://discord.com/invite/livieshq


Lyrics

New York City’s never looked so blue
My friends are smoking blunts in the bathroom
They say that honest love
Is a cage that makes you feel free
And all the girls at this party are so cool
That’s never been a thing that I could do
But I can’t help but imagine
What you say when you speak with me

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say
I’m a heart made of wax
And I’m melting in the sun
I’m a thread on your shirt
That is coming undone
I feel right, I feel wrong
I feel totally insane
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

Walking through the park with my head high
Past all the college girls and the drunk guys
And if there is a God
He’s the bond that’s between us two
Seven nights alone and a skipped meal
I’m sleeping in my dress and my high heels
And I’m too shy to say what I see
When I dream of you
When I dream of you

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say
I’m a heart made of wax
And I’m melting in the sun
I’m a thread on your shirt
That is coming undone
I feel right, I feel wrong
I feel totally insane
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

Every night like the one before
Dream of you from like 1 to 4
Positively and truly sure
Nobody’s wanted somebody more
It’s a thing that I can’t ignore
Tell your friends that you’re mine
I’m yours
With the hand on my heart I swore
Nobody’s wanted somebody more
It’s a thing that I can’t ignore
Tell your friends that you’re mine
I’m yours
With a hand on my heart I swore

I’m going crazy
I’m going mad
I want you baby so bad

You’re a spark in the dark
And my clothes all caught aflame
You should feel how I feel
When somebody says your name
I’m a car speeding down
The boulevard without a brake
And I want you more than
Any stupid song could ever say

And I’m melting in the sun

bn.title: GTA 5 লাইভ #gta5 #gtav #গেমিং
bn.description:
চূড়ান্ত GTA V লাইভ স্ট্রিমে আপনাকে স্বাগতম, যেখানে আমরা দ্রুতগতির গাড়ি নিয়ে রেস করি, লস স্যান্টোস ঘুরে দেখি এবং স্বচ্ছন্দ গেমপ্লের সাথে আনন্দ করি। আপনি যদি হাই-স্পিড রেস, সাবলীল ড্রাইভিং এবং আরামদায়ক গেমিং স্ট্রিম পছন্দ করেন, তাহলে আপনি সঠিক জায়গায় এসেছেন। লাইভ চ্যাটে যোগ দিন, রেসের পরামর্শ দিন এবং স্বচ্ছন্দ পরিবেশে GTA 5-এর অবিরাম মজা উপভোগ করুন। এই স্ট্রিমটি মূলত গতি, স্টাইল এবং কমিউনিটির সাথে আড্ডা দেওয়ার জন্য। চ্যানেলকে সমর্থন করতে এবং GTA V পরিবারের অংশ হতে স্ট্রিমটি লাইক, সাবস্ক্রাইব এবং শেয়ার করতে ভুলবেন না। #gta6

#gtav #gta5 #trolling #gaming

snippet.description:
గోవింద నామాలు | Govinda Namalu Telugu Lyrics | Lord Venkateswara Devotional Songs In Telugu  


🌸 Govinda Namalu | Lord Venkateswara Devotional Songs | Telugu Lyrics 🙏 🌸

Listen to Govinda Namalu, the sacred hymns filled with the divine names of Lord Venkateswara Swamy.
These powerful bhajans are believed to bring wealth, prosperity, peace, and happiness into your life.

🪔 Benefits of Listening:

Removes negative energies and obstacles
Brings financial stability and abundance
Provides mental peace and spiritual strength
Listening daily brings special blessings and divine grace
Recite or listen with the mantra “Om Namo Venkateswaraya”

bn.description:
📷 ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/mrspike10/

ডিসকর্ডে আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 👇
https://discord.com/invite/2pejjUbCKj

▶️ দ্বিতীয় চ্যানেল - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCasVrVp-Lr0ynmxFeXRG3oQ

📧mrspikeinquiry@gmail.com

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

✅কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের ক্ষেত্রে ফেয়ার ইউজের (ন্যায্য ব্যবহার) পাল্লা ভারী থাকে।

✅ভিডিও গেম ডিসক্লেইমার: এই ভিডিওর বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক ব্যবহারের জন্য। গেমপ্লেটি হলো Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI) নামক একটি ভিডিও গেম এবং এটি একটি কাল্পনিক সৃষ্টি।

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
✅যারা আমার ভিডিও দেখেন, লাইক, শেয়ার এবং কমেন্ট করেন, তাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ। আপনাদের কাছে এটি হয়তো একটি ছোট বিষয় মনে হতে পারে, কিন্তু আমি আপনাদের প্রত্যেককে আন্তরিকভাবে ধন্যবাদ জানাই। আপনাদের দেওয়া সমস্ত মতামত এবং মন্তব্যই আমাদের চ্যানেলকে আজকের এই পর্যায়ে নিয়ে আসতে সাহায্য করেছে।
তাই আবারও, আপনাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ!!! 😍

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

Featuring Govinda and Manisha Koirala, it remains one of the most cherished romantic songs of the 1990s.

hi.title: Jab Tum Aa Jaate Ho (From "Maharaja") Govinda, Manisha Koirala | Sonu Nigam | Kavita Krishnamurthy
hi.description:
A timeless romantic melody sung by Sonu Nigam and Kavita Krishnamurthy. Composed by Nadeem-Shravan with lyrics by Sameer, this song beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and togetherness. Featuring Govinda and Manisha Koirala, it remains one of the most cherished romantic songs of the 1990s.

snippet.title: राधा की तमन्ना है | कान्हा मुझे मिल जाए | राधा कृष्ण प्रेम भजन | कृष्ण भजन | Shyam Bhajan Music
snippet.description:
राधा की तमन्ना है | कान्हा मुझे मिल जाए | राधा कृष्ण प्रेम भजन | कृष्ण भजन | Shyam Bhajan Music

राधा की तमन्ना है, कान्हा मुझे मिल जाए — एक बेहद भावुक और हृदयस्पर्शी राधा कृष्ण भजन। इस भजन में राधा रानी की अपने प्रिय श्याम से मिलने की तड़प, प्रेम और भक्ति का सुंदर वर्णन किया गया है। यदि आप राधा कृष्ण के प्रेम रस में डूबना चाहते हैं तो यह भजन आपके मन को अवश्य छू जाएगा।

🙏 जय श्री राधे कृष्ण 🙏
🎵 प्रस्तुतकर्ता: Shyam Bhajan Music

राधा की तमन्ना है, कान्हा मुझे मिल जाए, Radha Ki Tamanna Hai, Kanha Mujhe Mil Jaye, Radha Krishna Bhajan, Krishna Bhajan, Radha Rani Bhajan, Shyam Bhajan, Hindi Bhajan, Bhakti Song, Krishna Song, Radha Krishna Song, Vrindavan Bhajan, Barsana Bhajan, Kanha Bhajan, Latest Krishna Bhajan, Emotional Krishna Bhajan, Devotional Song, Krishna Devotional Song, Radhe Radhe, Shyam Bhajan Music, Krishna Bhajan 2026, Radha Krishna Prem Bhajan, Bhajan Geet

snippet.title: जेठ महीने की ग्यारस आई, बेबे धर्म कमाइयो - एकादशी स्पेशल भजन 2026 | Jeth Mahine Ki Gyaras Aayi
snippet.description:
🌼जेठ महीने की ग्यारस आई, बेबे धर्म कमाइयो | Ekadashi Bhajan 2026 🌼
(He Jeth Mahine Ki Gyaras Aayi Bebe Dharam Kamaiyo)

भक्ति और धर्म की महिमा से भरपूर यह सुंदर एकादशी भजन "जेठ महीने की ग्यारस आई, ऐ बेबे धर्म कमाइयो" आपके लिए प्रस्तुत है। 🙏

इस भजन में निर्जला एकादशी के पुण्य कार्यों, सेवा, दान, जल पिलाने, वृक्षारोपण, तीर्थ स्नान, कन्या भोज और सत्संग की महिमा का सुंदर वर्णन किया गया है। यह भजन हमें धर्म, सेवा और परोपकार का संदेश देता है।

✨ भजन सुनें, परिवार के साथ साझा करें और एकादशी माता का आशीर्वाद प्राप्त करें।

Song Info :-
■ Title ▹He Jeth Mahine Ki Gyaras Aayi Bebe Dharm Kamaiyo
■ Artist ▹ Priyanka
■ Singer ▹ Kiran Negi
■ Music ▹ Kuldeep Mali Aala
■ Keyboard Player ▹ Sachin Kamal 
■ Lyrics ▹ Bhateri Lather
■ Composition ▹Traditional
■ Song Production Support ▹Rajesh Madina
■ Editing ▹Max Ranga
■ Cameraman ▹Gulshan Bawa
■ Label ▹Fine Digital Video
■ Copyright ▹Fine Digital Media

Special Thanks To All Team

👍 वीडियो पसंद आए तो Like करें
💬 Comment में लिखें: "जय एकादशी माता"
📢 अपने दोस्तों और परिवार के साथ Share करें
🔔 ऐसे ही नए भजन सुनने के लिए Channel FINE DIGITAL HARYANVI को Subscribe करना न भूलें नीचे दिए हुए लिंक पे
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClwM5RNjqRRnAf1CGBEe_8g?sub_confirmation=1

🌿 भजन की विशेषताएं:
✔ निर्जला एकादशी विशेष भजन
✔ पारंपरिक हरियाणवी लोक शैली
✔ धर्म, दान और सेवा का संदेश
✔ सत्संग एवं भक्ति रस से भरपूर

🙏 एकादशी माता सब पर अपनी कृपा बनाए रखें।
जय श्री हरि विष्णु 🙏 | जय एकादशी माता 🙏

snippet.title: Kasam Khake Kaho - Lyrical | Preity Zinta | Arjun Rampal | Mahima | Kumar Sanu | Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Song Credits :
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik & Kumar Sanu
Music Director : Nadeem Shravan
Lyricist : Sameer

Lyrics :

Hey Hey Hey Aa Ha Ha...
Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho, Dil Lagake Kaho Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai 
 
Sharmake Kaho Balkhake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai
 
Ek Ajab See Dil Me Hasrat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Chahe Tumko Dil Me Chahat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Hame Pyar Karo, Ikrar Karo, Sanso Me Basake Rakh Lo
Tum Sham-O-Saher Didar Karo, Khwabo Me Chhupake Rakh Lo
 
Najar Jhukake Kaho, Palak Uthake Kaho
Ha Kaho Naa Kaho, Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Ek Bechainee See Hotee Hai, Abb Toh Tere Nam Se
Ishk Huwa Jab Se Naa Gujra Ek Lamha Aaram Se
Kya Hal Huwa Chahat Me Sanam, Mushkil Hai Tumse Kuchh Kehna
Hai Tumko Kasam Mehbub Kabhee, Aankho Se Dur Naa Rehna
Itrake Kaho, Jhilmilake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho
Han Kaho Naa Kaho, Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

#KasamKhakeKaho #DilHaiTumhaara #PreityZinta #ArjunRampal #AlkaYagnik #KumarSanu #MahimaChaudhary

Chahat Ko Tum Zinda Rakhna, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

📌 Recommended For:
90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

Agar aapko ye gana pasand aaye to:
👍 Like karein
💬 Comment me apni feelings share karein
🔔 Channel ko subscribe karein
❤️ Is song ko apne pyaar ke saath share karein

hindi melody 90s style

slow romantic hindi song
bollywood nostalgic song
indian romantic song

Chahat Ko Tum Zinda Rakhna, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

📌 Recommended For:
90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

Agar aapko ye gana pasand aaye to:
👍 Like karein
💬 Comment me apni feelings share karein
🔔 Channel ko subscribe karein
❤️ Is song ko apne pyaar ke saath share karein

snippet.title: तुम्हारी नज़रों में हमने देखा | Kal Ki Awaz | Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu Songs | Pratibha Sinha
snippet.description:
नब्बे के दशक की सुनहरी यादें और आशा भोंसले व कुमार सानू की जादुई आवाज़। फिल्म 'कल की आवाज़' का यह सदाबहार नगमा 'तुम्हारी नजरों में हमने देखा' आज भी प्रेमियों के दिलों को छू लेता है। यह गीत प्यार की उस मासूमियत को दर्शाता है जो आज भी उतनी ही ताज़ा है।



Credits :

Song: Tumhari Nazron Mein Humne Dekha
Album: Kal Ki Awaz
Artist: Asha Bhosle | Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 



Lyrics :

Tumhaari nazron mein humne dekha
Ajab si chaahat jhalak rahi hain
Tumhaari nazron mein humne dekha
Ajab si chaahat jhalak rahi hain
Tumhaare honton ki surkhiyon se,
Tumhaare honton ki surkhiyon se,
Vafa ki shabnam chhalak rahi hain


Tumhaari nazron mein humne dekha
Ajab si chaahat jhalak rahi hain
Tumhaari nazron mein humne dekha
Ajab si chaahat jhalak rahi hain
Hamaari saanson ko chhooke dekho,
Hamaari saanson ko chhooke dekho,
Tumhaari khushboo mahek rahi hain
Tumhaari nazron mein humne dekha
Ajab si chaahat jhalak rahi hain


Kasam khuda ki yakeen kar lo
Kasam khuda ki yakeen kar lo
Kahin bhi na hoga husn aisa
Na dekho aise jhukaake palkein
Na dekho aise jhukaake palkein
Hamaari niyat bahek rahi hain
Tumhaari nazron mein humne dekha
Ajab si chaahat jhalak rahi hain
Tumhaari nazron mein humne dekha
Ajab si chaahat jhalak rahi hain


Tumhaari ulfat mein jaane jaana
Tumhaari ulfat mein jaane jaana
Hamein mili thi jo ek dhadkan
Hamaari seene mein aaj tak woh
Hamaari seene mein aaj tak woh
Tumhaari dhadkan dhadak rahi hain
Tumhaari nazron mein humne dekha
Ajab si chaahat jhalak rahi hai


Tumhaari nazron mein humne dekha
Ajab si chaahat jhalak rahi hain
Tumhaare honton ki surkhiyon se
Tumhaare honton ki surkhiyon se
Vafa ki shabnam chhalak rahi hain
Tumhaari nazron mein humne dekha
Ajab si chaahat jhalak rahi hain

क्या आपको भी 90 के दशक के ये रोमांटिक गाने पसंद हैं? अपना पसंदीदा गाना कमेंट में बताएं। अगर आपको यह वीडियो पसंद आया हो तो लाइक करें, शेयर करें और चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

Let the magic of music live on…

#TumhariNazronMeinHumneDekha #AshaBhosle #KumarSanu #90sRomanticSongs #KalKiAwaz #EvergreenHits #HindiSongs #RetroMusic


#TumhariNazronMeinHumneDekha #KalKiAwaz #AshaBhosle #KumarSanu #90sRomanticSongs #HindiLoveSongs #BollywoodRetro #EternalMelodies #OldHindiSongs #RomanticBallads #1992Hits #EvergreenHindiMusic #AshaBhosleRomanticSongs #KumarSanuLoveSongs #SoulfulMusic #ClassicBollywood #MusicalJourney #NostalgicHindiSongs #RomanticHitsOf90s #MelodiousDuets #HeartTouchingSongs

snippet.title: O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️| 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026 #90s #song
snippet.description:
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️| 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026 #90s #song  
O Firki Wali Tu Kal Aaja ❤️ | 90's Bollywood Style Romantic Song | Hindi Love Song 2026

O Firki Wali ek heart touching Hindi romantic song hai jo 90's Bollywood ke retro vibes aur emotional love story ko capture karta hai. Yeh gaana un sab ke liye hai jo sachche pyaar, yaadein aur judai ko mehsoos karte hain.

Isme aapko milega:
• Retro Bollywood feel 🎞️
• Emotional aur soulful lyrics 💔
• Soft melody jo dil ko chhoo jaaye 🎶
• Old is gold style romantic vibe ✨

Agar aapko 90's Bollywood songs, sad love songs, aur Hindi romantic music pasand hai, to yeh gaana aapke playlist me zaroor hona chahiye.

🎧 Best experience ke liye headphones use karein

(Song Lyrics) 

ओ फ़िरकी वाली तू कल आ जा,
सपनों में मेरे फिर समा जा।
तेरी बातों का रंग निराला,
दिल को मेरे फिर बहला जा॥

जब से देखा तेरा चेहरा,
दिल ने तुझको अपना माना।
चाँद भी शरमा जाए देखे,
तेरा प्यारा सा मुस्काना॥

पायल की छम-छम सुनकर,
दिल मेरा बेकरार हो जाए।
एक नज़र जो तू मिलाए,
हर मौसम बहार हो जाए॥

ओ फ़िरकी वाली तू कल आ जा,
दिल की गलियों में फिर छा जा।
तेरी हँसी का जादू ऐसा,
सारी दुनिया को भुला जा॥

तेरी ज़ुल्फों की ठंडी छाँव,
मुझको अपना घर लगती है।
तेरी बातों की मीठी खुशबू,
साँसों में घुल जाती है॥

रातों को जब याद तू आए,
नींदों का पता खो जाए।
दिल के हर एक कोने में बस,
तेरा ही चेहरा नज़र आए॥

आ जा सजना देर न करना,
दिल को यूँ मजबूर न करना।
तेरे बिना ये तन्हा रातें,
लगती हैं सदियों के जैसा॥

snippet.title: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai - Title Track | Varun, Mrunal, Pooja | Anu M, Javed - Mohsin, Sameer A
snippet.description:
Get ready to groove to the electrifying title track "Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai"! Packed with vibrant energy, catchy beats, and youthful romance, this song is the perfect celebration of love, fun, and unforgettable moments.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Credits : 
Track Name: Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai 
Music Recreated by: Javed - Mohsin 
Additional Lyrics by: Mohsin Shaikh
Singers: Shankar Mahadevan & Hema Sardesai
Rap By Ranj & Earl Edgar
Original Music Composer: Anu Malik
Original Lyrics by: Sameer Anjaan

Movie Details: 
Tips Films Ltd Presents
Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai
Directed By David Dhawan
Produced By Ramesh Taurani
Cast: Varun Dhawan, Mrunal Thakur, Pooja Hegde, Maniesh Paul, Chunky Pandey, Jimmy Shergill, Mouni Roy

मुखड़ा
अपना मेहर से तू त, कुछ त छुपावातारा 
रुपया उड़ावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा
ख़ाली हमके सतावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा

अंतरा
तहरो जवानी चढ़ल हमरो जवानी 
तब काहे बहरा काटेला जाके चानी 
( हम कहाँ फ़ानी )
रोज़ नया नया करेला तलाश राजाजी 
हम सूत जाईब खाके सल्फ़ाश राजाजी 

घरवा में छोड़ी कनिया, नचनिया नचावातारा 
रुपया उड़ावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा
ख़ाली हमके सतावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा

अंतरा
प्रिंस प्रियांशु के लागल बा दुआ
तबे मरद तू भेटईला लफूआ 
( साफ़ लफुआ हो गईला … ए हो )
आजे पता हमरा चलल बा डीपीया से 
तोहर चलाता चक्कर शिलीपिया से 

ले ले तू बाड़ऽ टेंडर, ब्लेंडर पियावातारा 
ह त रुपया उड़ावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा
ख़ाली हमके सतावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा

snippet.description:
Presenting the 8K Video Song of "Thanga Sela.." from #KAALA - a Santhosh Narayanan musical

Listen To The Music of Kaala (Tamil)

iTunes/Apple Music - https://apple.co/2rzu5ej
Amazon Music - https://amzn.to/2G5PAYL
Gaana - https://bit.ly/2w4fDQ7
Saavn - https://bit.ly/2JKHWVW
Wynk Music - https://bit.ly/2FyXYzT
Raaga - https://bit.ly/2reWfv8
Hungama - https://bit.ly/2I6JKve
Jio Music - https://bit.ly/2HHjkkv
Eros Now - https://bit.ly/2wsA1uE
Idea Music - https://bit.ly/2KUBjSv
Google Play - https://bit.ly/2G78luP

Available on International Streaming Platforms

Spotify - https://spoti.fi/2kx3xXg
Deezer - https://bit.ly/2siUj5p
KKBox - https://bit.ly/2stdw3E

Joox - https://bit.ly/2IYXJEz
Shazam - https://bit.ly/2L2gIdS

Wunderbar Films - Dhanush Proudly Presents | Lyca Productions

Super Star Rajinikanth in & as
"KAALA"
Pa Ranjith

Tracks Credits:
Track - Thanga Sela 
Lyrics : Arunraja Kamaraj
Singers : Shankar Mahadevan, Pradeep Kumar, Ananthu
Chorus : Santhosh Narayanan
Acoustic Guitars : Keba Jeremiah
Bass : Naveen
Harmonium : Satish Raghunathan
Indian Percussions : Ganapathy, Venkat
Shakers : Pradeep Kumar

Buy the Official Merchandise of #Kaala at http://bit.ly/Kaala-Rajini

All Songs Composed, Arranged, Programmed and Mixed by Santhosh Narayanan
Special Thanks to Satt Richard for Additional Mixes
Recorded at Resound India - Chennai,Future Tense studios – Chennai, Stadium Studios - London, UK, Krimson Avenue Studios – Chennai, Purple Haze Studios - Mumbai, ROCSHO MUSIC - MALAYSIA
Recording Engineers:  Sai Shravanam, RK Sundar, Abin Pushpakaran,KHISHO THARAN, Dinesh Antony
Additional Mix : Dinesh Antony
Mixed at AM Studios - Chennai, Future Tense Studios - Chennai
Mastered by Alex Gordon at Abbey Road Studios
Kannamma Mastered by Simon Young at Abbey Road Studios
Musician Coordinator – Meenakshi Santhosh
London musicians and Abbey Road Mastering co-ordinator: Andrew T. Mackay/ Bohemia Junction Limited

KAALA

Cast:
Super Star Rajinikanth, Nana Patekar, Eswari Rao, Huma Qureshi, Samuthirakani, Sampath Raj, Sayaji Shinde, Anjali Patil, Manikandan, Dileepan, Pankaj Tripathi, Ravi Kale, Ramesh Thilak, Arul Doss, Aravind Akash, Sakshi Agarwal, Arundhati, Suganya, Nithish

Crew: 
Directed by Pa. Ranjith
Cinematographer : Murali.G
Music Director : Santhosh Narayanan
Editor : Sreekar Prasad
Art Director : T.Ramalingam
Sound Designer : Anthony BJ Ruban
Stunts : Dhilip Subbarayan
Lyricists : Kabilan, Umadevi, Arunraja Kamaraj, Arivu
Choreographer : Brinda, Sandy
Sound Mixing: Suren G
Costume Designers : Anuvardhan, Subika, Selvan
Stills : RS Raja
PRO : Riaz K Ahmed
Production Executive : S.P.Chokalingam, R. Rakesh
Executive Producer : S.Vinod Kumar
Produced By Dhanush

Production : Wunderbar Films | Lyca Productions

Music on Wunderbar Studios
Digital Partner : Divo

snippet.title: Thaakkol - Balan: The Boy | Sushin Shyam | Nila Raj | Anwar Ali | New Malayalam Song
snippet.description:
𝐓𝐡𝐚𝐚𝐤𝐤𝐨𝐥 is an original rhyme crafted in the spirit of the folk tales and playful verses many of us grew up with. It follows the story of a little frog searching for a lost key, journeying through the forest and asking different animals for help along the way. Unfolding through a lively call-and-response pattern, the song captures the simplicity, imagination, and wonder of childhood. Featured in Balan – The Boy, Thaakkol is a gentle reminder of the stories, games, and adventures that once filled our world.

Song: Thaakkol 
Movie: Balan: The Boy
Music Composer: Sushin Shyam
Lyricist: Anwar Ali
Lead Singer: Nila Raj
Choir: Aadya Aneesh, Milia Maria Noble, Samanwita Sarath, Abhiram Krishna, Bhadra Hari, Chinmayi Kiranlal, Dakshina IM
One Man Quartet: Rithu Vysakh
Mix Engineer: Abin Paul
Audio Mastered by Donal Whelan@Mastering world, U.K
Vocals Recorded at M Lounge
Recording Engineer Amal Raj
Project Manager: Uthara Krishnan
Artist Coordinator: Vincent KD

Cast - Adhisheshan, Farzana Palathingal, Muhammed Zinaan, Dolly June, Jean Paul Lal, Girish AD & Beena Antony
Directed By: Chidambaram 
Produced By: Venkat K Narayana, Shailaja Desai Fenn 
Written By: Jithu Madhavan  
Director of Photography: Shyju Khalid Isc 
Editor - Vivek Harshan  
Production Designer - Ajayan Chalissery 
Art Director - Indulal Kaveed Audiography Shijin Melvin Hutton, Abhishek Nair  
Costume Designer: Sapna Kajha Rawther 
Associate Producers: Pooja Shah, Dhaval Jatania 
Casting Director, Executive Producer - Ganapathi  
Cast: Adhisheshan, Farzana Palathingal, Muhammed Zinaan, Dolly June, Jean Paul Lal, Girish AD & Beena Antony 
Publicity Design: Yellowtooths 
Make Up - Ronex Xavier  
Production Controller - Deepak Parameswaran  
Associate Directors - Binu Balan, SK Sreerag  
Colorist - Srik Varrier  
Di Studio - Color Planet Studios  
VFX - Eggwhite VFX 
Still Photographer - Rohith K Suresh
Lyric video - Yellowtooths Motion
Subtitles Leon Vincent - Wordsworth

Lyrics:
Kando kando thaakkol,
Kunjan thavalayude thaakkol.
Naattil thendi nadakkumbol,
Kaanaathaayoru thaakkol,
Kaanaathaayoru thaakkol...
Mann kuzhikkum njendalyaa,
Kando neeyaa thaakkol?
Kando neeyaa thaakkol?
Mann kuzhikkum neram,
Engane kaanum thaakkol...
Pattam ketti varum kombaa,
Nee kandodaa thaakkol?
Nee kandodaa thaakkol?
Kottum chendayilillallo,
Pottumamittilumillallo,
Payyin vaale thoongiyole,
Mundikokke nee kando?
Neettil ponthum meene,
Kannaale njaan kandullu.
Kombil njaalum vavvaale,
Kando velli thaakkol?
Kuttirittilumillallo,
Utharathilumillallo,
Chodhichangane poyyaare,
Neendu nivarnnu kidakkunnu,
Thaakkol poloru neerkkoli,
Thaakkol poloru neerkkoli.
Kunjan thavalachaarinnum,
Ellaarodum chodhichu:
"Thaakkol kando?"
"Pekkrom pekkrom!"
Veedin velli thaakkol.
"Thaakkol kando?"
"Pekkrom pekkrom!"
Minnaaminni thaakkol,
Minnaaminni thaakkol

Malayalam Lyrics:
കണ്ടോ കണ്ടോ താക്കോൽ
കണ്ടോ കണ്ടോ താക്കോൽ

കണ്ടോ കണ്ടോ താക്കോൽ,
കുഞ്ഞൻ തവളയുടെ താക്കോൽ
നാട്ടിൽ തേടി നടക്കുമ്പോൾ,
കാണാതായൊരു താക്കോൽ,
കാണാതായൊരു താക്കോൽ...

മൺകുഴിക്കും ഞണ്ടളിയാ,
കണ്ടോ നീയാ താക്കോൽ?
കണ്ടോ നീയാ താക്കോൽ?
മൺകുഴിക്കും നേരം
എങ്ങനെ കാണും താക്കോൽ...

പട്ടം കെട്ടി വരും കൊമ്പാ,
നീ കണ്ടോടാ താക്കോൽ?
നീ കണ്ടോടാ താക്കോൽ?
കൊട്ടും ചെണ്ടേലില്ലല്ലോ,
പൊട്ടുമിട്ടിലുമില്ലല്ലോ,
പയ്യിൻ വാലേ തൂങ്ങോളേ,
മുണ്ടിക്കൊക്കേ നീ കണ്ടോ?

നീറ്റിൽ പൊന്തും മീനേ,
കണ്ണാലേ ഞാൻ കണ്ടുള്ളൂ.
കൊമ്പിൽ ഞാലും വവ്വാലേ,
കണ്ടോ വെള്ളി താക്കോൽ?

കുറ്റിരിട്ടിലുമില്ലല്ലോ,
ഉത്തരത്തിലുമില്ലല്ലോ,
ചോദിച്ചങ്ങനെ പോയാറെ,
നീണ്ടുനിവർന്നു കിടക്കുന്നു
താക്കോൽ പോലൊരു നീർക്കോലി,
താക്കോൽ പോലൊരു നീർക്കോലി.

കുഞ്ഞൻ തവളച്ചാരിന്നും
എല്ലാരോടും ചോദിപ്പു:
“താക്കോൽ കണ്ടോ?”
പെക്ക്റോം പെക്ക്റോം!

വീടിൻ വെള്ളി താക്കോൽ,
താക്കോൽ കണ്ടോ?
പെക്ക്റോം പെക്ക്റോം!

മിന്നാമിന്നി താക്കോൽ,
മിന്നാമിന്നി താക്കോൽ.

Gaana - https://bit.ly/43uM4EA

Apple Music - https://apple.co/4xtVtde

കാണാതായൊരു താക്കോൽ,
കാണാതായൊരു താക്കോൽ...

മൺകുഴിക്കും ഞണ്ടളിയാ,
കണ്ടോ നീയാ താക്കോൽ?
കണ്ടോ നീയാ താക്കോൽ?
മൺകുഴിക്കും നേരം
എങ്ങനെ കാണും താക്കോൽ...

പട്ടം കെട്ടി വരും കൊമ്പാ,
നീ കണ്ടോടാ താക്കോൽ?
നീ കണ്ടോടാ താക്കോൽ?
കൊട്ടും ചെണ്ടേലില്ലല്ലോ,
പൊട്ടുമിട്ടിലുമില്ലല്ലോ,
പയ്യിൻ വാലേ തൂങ്ങോളേ,
മുണ്ടിക്കൊക്കേ നീ കണ്ടോ?

നീറ്റിൽ പൊന്തും മീനേ,
കണ്ണാലേ ഞാൻ കണ്ടുള്ളൂ.
കൊമ്പിൽ ഞാലും വവ്വാലേ,
കണ്ടോ വെള്ളി താക്കോൽ?

കുറ്റിരിട്ടിലുമില്ലല്ലോ,
ഉത്തരത്തിലുമില്ലല്ലോ,
ചോദിച്ചങ്ങനെ പോയാറെ,
നീണ്ടുനിവർന്നു കിടക്കുന്നു
താക്കോൽ പോലൊരു നീർക്കോലി,
താക്കോൽ പോലൊരു നീർക്കോലി.

കുഞ്ഞൻ തവളച്ചാരിന്നും
എല്ലാരോടും ചോദിപ്പു:
“താക്കോൽ കണ്ടോ?”
പെക്ക്റോം പെക്ക്റോം!

വീടിൻ വെള്ളി താക്കോൽ,
താക്കോൽ കണ്ടോ?
പെക്ക്റോം പെക്ക്റോം!

മിന്നാമിന്നി താക്കോൽ,
മിന്നാമിന്നി താക്കോൽ.

snippet.title: Lakshmi Panchali | লক্ষ্মী পাঁচালী | Laxmi Panchali in Bengali | Lokkhi Panchali | Lakshmi Puja
snippet.description:
Lakshmi Panchali | লক্ষ্মী পাঁচালী | Lakshmi Puja | Laxmi Panchali in Bengali | Lokkhi Panchali

আমার প্রিয় ভক্তবৃন্দ, আপনাদের সকলকে @WingsBanglaOfficial   চ্যানেলটি সাবস্ক্রাইব করার এবং ভক্তিমূলক ভজন উপভোগ করার জন্য অনুরোধ করা হচ্ছে এবং অন্যান্য ভক্তদের সাথে শেয়ার করুন এবং অবশ্যই লাইক করুন

Cast : Shahrukh Khan, Amrish Puri, Mahima Chaudhry, Apoorva Agnihotri, Alok Nath, Himani Shivpuri & Aditya Narayan
